untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of multi-week price consolidation pattern (flag formation) and precise identification of prior 90% rise duration <2 months. No allowed indicators directly measure pattern geometry, consolidation area boundaries, or historical rise duration/magnitude lookback. Breakout detection from flag resistance also requires pattern-aware logic not available in allowed indicator set. The conditions provided are approximations only.
translation_notes: Approximated using: (1) returns >= 0.90 for 90% minimum rise requirement, (2) close > sma_20 to detect price in uptrend consolidation, (3) bb_bandwidth < 0.05 to detect tight consolidation/low volatility characteristic of flags. Exit on moving average crossdown as proxy for breakout failure. Actual flag pattern detection, consolidation zone identification, and proper duration/amplitude measurements are not possible with available indicators.
